title: Capstone 02 — RAG over Codebase (Cross-Repo Semantic Search)

questions.question: Why is naive cosine search over raw chunks insufficient for cross-repo code retrieval?
options: It poisons results on generated code, monorepo duplication, and rarely imported symbols
Cosine similarity is undefined on code embeddings
Vector indexes cannot store payloads larger than 1KB
Embedding models do not see code as tokens
questions.question_zh: 为什么对原始 chunk 直接做 cosine 检索不足以支撑跨仓库代码检索?
options_zh: 对生成代码、monorepo 重复以及很少被 import 的符号,结果会被毒化
Cosine 相似度在代码 embedding 上未定义
向量索引无法存储超过 1KB 的 payload
Embedding 模型不会把代码视为 token

questions.question: What does AST-aware chunking mean in the ingestion pipeline?
options: Compressing chunks with gzip before storage
Dropping comments and whitespace before embedding
Cutting at tree-sitter node boundaries such as function and class spans
Splitting code into fixed 256-token windows
questions.question_zh: 在入库流水线中,AST-aware chunking 指什么?
options_zh: 在存储前用 gzip 压缩 chunk
在 embedding 之前去掉注释和空白
按 tree-sitter 节点边界 (例如函数和类的范围) 切分
把代码切成固定 256 token 的窗口

questions.question: Which three retrievable modalities does each chunk get in this pipeline?
options: Token IDs, syntax tree, and call graph
AST, IR, and bytecode
Raw text, gzip, and hash
Dense embedding, BM25 terms, and a natural-language summary
questions.question_zh: 本流水线给每个 chunk 附带哪三种可检索模态?
options_zh: Token id、语法树和调用图
AST、IR 和字节码
原始文本、gzip 和 hash
Dense embedding、BM25 词项,以及一段自然语言摘要

questions.question: What is the role of the cross-encoder reranker after the hybrid retrieval step?
options: It rewrites the chunks to remove generated code
It re-embeds the query in a different model
It compresses the chunks before sending to the synthesizer
It scores each query-candidate pair together for higher accuracy than cosine alone
questions.question_zh: 在 hybrid 检索之后,cross-encoder reranker 的作用是什么?
options_zh: 重写 chunk 以去掉生成代码
用另一个模型重新对 query 做 embedding
在送给合成器之前压缩 chunk
对每对 (query, candidate) 联合打分,准确度高于仅用 cosine

questions.question: Why does the synthesizer reject answers without (repo/path:start-end) anchors?
options: Citation faithfulness gates the answer so users can verify each claim
Anchors reduce token cost on the synthesis call
Anchors are needed for downstream BM25 reranking
Anchors are required by the vector database schema
questions.question_zh: 为什么 synthesizer 拒绝没有 (repo/path:start-end) 锚点的回答?
options_zh: 引用可信度门控住答案,让用户能逐条核验
锚点能降低合成调用的 token 成本
下游 BM25 reranking 需要锚点
向量数据库 schema 要求带锚点

questions.question: What does incremental re-index require to stay under 60 seconds on a 50-file push?
options: Re-embedding only chunks whose text changed and recomputing affected symbol edges
Re-embedding the full 2M-LOC corpus on each commit
Dropping the symbol graph entirely
Throwing away the BM25 index and rebuilding it from scratch
questions.question_zh: 在 50 个文件的 push 上,增量重建索引要在 60 秒内完成,需要做什么?
options_zh: 只对文本变化的 chunk 做重新 embedding,并重算受影响的符号边
每次 commit 都对完整 200 万 LOC 语料重新 embedding
完全丢弃符号图
丢掉 BM25 索引并从零重建

questions.question: Which metric measures whether retrieved claims are verifiable in the source?
options: MRR@10
Citation faithfulness
nDCG@10
p95 query latency
questions.question_zh: 哪个指标衡量检索得到的论断在源码中是否可验证?
options_zh: MRR@10
Citation faithfulness (引用可信度)
nDCG@10
p95 query latency
